---
name: Bug Fix PR
about: Template for bug fixes
title: "[DEV/MAIN-BugFix] <short description of the bug fix>"
agent instructions:
  - when creating a new PR follow these instructions :
      - get the diff commits and craft a general title
      - extract teh bugs and add each one in a separate lines
      - When creating notes, each subject should have only 1 note, do not spread them across multiple nodes
      - When creating note, choose one of the given labels (the labels between parenthesis)
---
